metadata.description: Promote: 39-skill stack for end-to-end product promotion strategy with two-pass orchestration. Channel-strategist proposes channels actively (organic + paid). 19 world-class operator skills (Welsh, McGarry, Lenny, Ferriss, Robinson, Isenberg, Brock Johnson, Indig, Hormozi-shortform, Gerhardt, Faris, Wilcox, Mike Ryan, Vallaeys, Seufert, Sanchez, Curry + Hormozi/MrBeast/x-mastery existing) consulted in strategic mode, then production mode for 14 days of concrete content. promote-content-batcher converts the 76 remaining outlines on demand.

plugins.name: promote
plugins.description: v1.1.0 — 39 skills (19 operators + 6 framework skills + 12 personas + 2 orchestrators) + 20 references for end-to-end promotion strategy. Coverage: organic (X, LinkedIn, Newsletter, Substack, Founder, SEO/GEO, TikTok/Reels/Shorts, Instagram, Discord, Podcast, Outbound, YouTube long-form, Reddit, HN/launches, Facebook, Pinterest organic, emerging) + paid (Meta, Google PMax, Google Search/PPC, Mobile/iOS14, TikTok/Snapchat, Amazon/YouTube, LinkedIn Ads, X+Reddit+Pinterest paid, emerging paid).
